title: Tarzan and the Slave Girl
writer: Hans Jacoby, Arnold Belgard, Edgar Rice Burroughs
actors: Lex Barker, Vanessa Brown, Robert Alda
plot: As Jane and the local tribeswomen are abducted one by one by the wild Lionians, Tarzan attempts to persuade their prince to accept a potent medicament for his ailing men, while the girls face certain death. Can Tarzan set them free?
